prestazioni: Engine: Ford Coyote 5.0L V8 (Aluminator XS, engine code: M-6007-M50A) with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, Mahle forged pistons, and billet crankshaft) paired with a Saleen-specific supercharger (Saleen TVS2650 supercharger, 12 psi boost, intercooled with a custom air-to-water setup by Lingenfelter)
Exhaust: Custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Borla with XR-1 mufflers and equal-length headers (JBA 1-7/8-inch long-tube headers) for optimized scavenging and a 12 dB aggressive tone

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the S302 Black Label chassis) with Eibach sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response
estetica: Aero: Saleen S302 Black Label-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) paired with a custom carbon fiber rear wing (Rocket Bunny-style, 3D-scanned for optimal downforce at 150+ mph)
Wheels: HRE FF01 flow-formed wheels (20x10.5 front, 20x11.5 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear) and custom center-lock adapters for quick swaps

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats (custom embroidered with Saleen Black Label logos) paired with a roll cage (Chassisworks G-comp 8-point bolt-in cage) and a MoTeC C127 dash display for real-time telemetry
